title: Monorepo Path Mapping Issue — Workspace Root vs Project Directory
body:
## Description

The monorepo has a workspace root mismatch that causes agent tools to fail when writing files.

## Problem

- **Workspace root**: `c:\Users\user\jengaprojects`
- **Actual project**: `jengabooks/` (subdirectory)
- Agent file regex patterns (in `.roomodes`) expected paths like `apps/web/src/...`
- But actual file paths include the `jengabooks/` prefix: `jengabooks/apps/web/src/...`
- This caused `apply_diff` and `write_to_file` tools to reject writes with file restriction errors

## Root Cause

The `.roomodes` file regex patterns like `^(apps/web/src/|packages/shared/src/).*` did not account for the single-level directory prefix (`jengabooks/`).

## Fix Applied

Changed regex to `^(?:[^/]+/)?(apps/web/src/|packages/shared/src/).*` — the `(?:[^/]+/)?` makes any single-level directory prefix optional.

## Affected Agents

frontend-web, frontend-mobile, backend-logic, backend-database, devops, documentarian, qa-automator

## Files Fixed
- `.roomodes` (root)
- `jengabooks/.roomodes` (project)

## Prevention
- Any future agent additions must use the `(?:[^/]+/)?` prefix pattern
- Consider moving the workspace root to the project directory directly
